title: TUI email client in native Golang with LLM based drafting functions
abstract: TUI email client in native Golang with LLM based drafting functions delivers solid reasoning and generation capabilities through a straightforward API. It is not another ChatGPT wrapper — the archi...
abstract_zh: 讲真，TUI email client in native Golang with LLM based drafting functions 这个模型值得你花时间了解一下。不是那种"又一个ChatGPT壳子"的路数，底层有真东西。API接上就能干活，不废话。
